_about: Creative Library registry (repo/config, evidence-first), NDIS Yarns — SECOND governed brand (D7 second-brand exit test). SKELETON v0.1 (2026-07-17): authored ahead of the brand decision on category/footer (both to_be_confirmed) and ahead of N5 background intake (asset_keys pending). NDIS Yarns has NEVER rendered a governed image_quote — every object here is status=candidate / proof_status=unproven / render_log_id=null. No proof is claimed. Declarative only, NOT consumed by production workers (runtime-import guard); the runtime reads a VENDORED projection (creative_contract.ts) which is a SEPARATE T3 code+deploy lane (N7b). Schema: docs/creative-library/registry-schema-v2.md. Model mirrors property-pulse.json.
model: style_guide -> (governs) -> assets + patterns -> (compose) -> template_families -> (instantiate as) -> creative_instances -> evidence

posture.declarative_only: Declarative only — not consumed by production workers.
posture.pk_approval: PK approval authority unchanged; AI proposes, never approves
posture.skeleton_note: v0.1: the two gating brand values are now DECIDED (PK 2026-07-18: category='NDIS UPDATE', footer='' [intentional resolved blank]); background asset_keys remain to_be_confirmed until N5 intake (sole P0 = brand_texture-01, PK 2026-07-18). The vendored code projection (creative_contract.ts CREATIVE_CONTRACT_REGISTRY entry) is the render-critical N7b lane and is NOT authored by this declarative file: post-G0b the image-worker fail-closes brand_payload_contract_unresolved for NDIS until that vendored entry deploys.

style_guide.purpose: The NDIS Yarns brand constitution — brand-level rules that GOVERN NDIS Yarns Assets, Patterns, and Template Families for the governed image_quote format (second-brand exit test scope).

governance.note: Governs the brand's creative objects; PK ratifies. AI may propose, never approves.

palette.scrim: dark scrim (opacity resolved per-background by resolve_slot_assets safe_for_text_overlay; PP precedent ~0.55-0.58)
palette.note: Brand primary/secondary colours are sourced at render time from c.client_brand_profile (documented values brand_colour_primary=#0A2A4A, brand_colour_secondary=#1C8A8A; accent_hex is null) and are NOT re-declared here — marked to_be_confirmed per the PP convention. No brand colours invented.

typography.hierarchy: Headline dominant > category badge / labels > subtitle > footer (small).
typography.note: The generic market-insight card's font is a property of the shared generic template (generic_market_insight_card_1x1_v1), not documented for NDIS. Marked to_be_confirmed; no font invented.

spacing.note: Inherited from the shared generic template; exact spacing to_be_confirmed. Declarative reference.

logo_rules.fallback: fail-closed (missing_required_logo) — no wordmark fallback on the governed path
logo_rules.note: Logo referenced as a governed asset (asset_key ny_logo_full_colour); promoted/eligible 2026-07-17 (asset_id d1b10010, D7 step 2). Reconstruction accepted for the proof; authoritative-logo swap is a separate PK gate.

safe_area_rules.note: Inherited from the generic 1:1 template safe area; keep logo + footer inside the platform safe area.

scrim_rules.applies_when: a governed background photo is present (needs_scrim / true class per resolve_slot_assets)
scrim_rules.requirement: dark scrim so text-over-image meets contrast

voice_tone_rules.tone: Plain-English NDIS/disability-sector news — warm, grounded, practitioner-voice, calm, honest.
voice_tone_rules.note: Evidence-derived from c.client_brand_profile.brand_voice_keywords + brand_values; card-surface tone beyond this is to_be_confirmed. Nothing invented.

accessibility_rules.minimum_contrast: white/brand text over the dark scrim (exact ratio to_be_confirmed)
accessibility_rules.readable_text: minimum legible font sizes per the generic template
accessibility_rules.text_over_image: no text over a busy photo without the scrim
accessibility_rules.safe_area_awareness: text / logo / footer kept inside platform safe areas
accessibility_rules.overprint_note: D5/P8 — the PP overprint fix (winner-scoped layout guard, image-worker v3.24.0) is generic (keys on generic_market_insight_card_1x1_v1) and applies to NDIS too, BUT overprint is text-length-against-geometry: it MUST be re-evidenced on NDIS's own (stat-led) headline corpus at the step-5/step-7 PK visual gate. A PP closure does not transfer.

asset_rules.note: Assets are governed SEPARATELY in c.client_brand_asset and referenced by asset_key — never raw URLs. The style guide constrains HOW assets are used, not the files.
asset_rules.resolution: Asset resolution via resolve_slot_assets (governed TMR path) — UNCHANGED; this style guide introduces NO resolver behaviour.
asset_rules.backgrounds: PENDING N5 intake. PK-approved P0 set = brand_texture-01 (deep navy silky waves; sha256 40fb69b42a881533e9f1bb73380330073f6f89e3a2150cabf7ca045ab7b788f5) + civic_neutral-04 (curved silver/glass facade; sha256 17c54fa3d5abee123ccd817daf9e028a40210a429b1c3f36ea038a887bb42e2f). Both Pexels License, attribution not required. asset_keys to_be_confirmed at intake. Neither is DB-intaken yet (0 NDIS backgrounds live); until at least one is intaken AND promoted eligible, resolve_slot_assets Background slot fail-closes. Backgrounds enter FENCED (approved=false) and are un-fenced at a separate promotion gate.

pattern_rules.note: Governs the NDIS pattern candidates — each conforms_to_style_guide=ndis-yarns-styleguide-v1.
pattern_rules.posture: patterns remain candidate; the style guide does NOT promote them to proven.

template_family_rules.note: Template Families MUST conform to this style guide. NDIS binds the SHARED GENERIC template (no client-scoped template — select_template rejects scope<>'generic'). The style guide governs but does NOT render.
template_family_rules.posture: unproven — no NDIS render exists yet.

evidence.notes: GOVERNANCE candidate — a style guide is not a render output. NDIS Yarns has produced NO governed render; there is NO supporting render evidence. Nothing proven. No false proof.

patterns.purpose: Brand identity strip — logo + footer/handle label framing the creative.

layout_rules.logo_placement: Per the generic template Logo slot.
layout_rules.brand_text_footer_treatment: Footer/handle label per the generic template Footer slot.
layout_rules.website_or_cta_text: Footer RESOLVED BLANK (PK 2026-07-18, footer='') — no URL/handle/brand-name/tagline. The Footer element must suppress cleanly (step-7 visual check).
layout_rules.asset_dependencies: ny_logo_full_colour (logo_primary). Maps to Logo.source + Footer.text (documentation only).

accessibility_rules.note: Logo legible against the dark scrim; footer kept at a legible minimum size.

evidence.notes: No NDIS render exists — no supporting evidence. Unproven.

patterns.purpose: Primary message — a required headline with an optional subtitle over the scrim.

layout_rules.required_headline: headline is the hard-gate field (render must not proceed without it).
layout_rules.optional_subtitle: subtitle renders below the headline when present.
layout_rules.overprint_guard: The generic winner-scoped layout guard (image-worker v3.24.0) bounds the headline box; overprint must still be re-evidenced on NDIS's stat-led corpus (P8).

accessibility_rules.note: White/brand text over the dark scrim; minimum font sizes per the generic template.

patterns.purpose: Theme/category label with an optional location/date line.

layout_rules.category_field: category is the badge label (short, upper-case treatment). VALUE 'NDIS UPDATE' (PK 2026-07-18, fixed v1 badge).
layout_rules.placement: Above the headline block; location/date as a secondary line.

accessibility_rules.note: Badge text legible against scrim; not the dominant element.

evidence.notes: No NDIS render exists — unproven. category value to_be_confirmed.

patterns.purpose: Full-bleed governed background photo with a dark scrim guaranteeing text legibility.

layout_rules.background_asset_requirement: background MUST resolve to a governed asset (asset_key) via resolve_slot_assets — never a raw URL.
layout_rules.scrim_requirement: A dark scrim is applied over the photo (governed NDIS backgrounds flagged needs_scrim / true).
layout_rules.fallback_background: If no governed background resolves, the host render fails loud (NO raw-URL fallback).
layout_rules.governed_asset_dependency: PENDING N5 intake — references_assets is EMPTY until the P0 set (brand_texture-01, civic_neutral-04) is intaken + promoted; asset_keys to_be_confirmed. This is why the Background slot fail-closes for NDIS today.

accessibility_rules.note: Scrim ensures text-over-image contrast; needs_scrim enforced.

evidence.notes: No NDIS render exists — unproven. Background asset_keys pending N5 intake.

template_families.purpose: NDIS Yarns News — the governed COMPOSITION of the brand's image_quote news card (branding strip + headline + category badge + background/scrim) on the SHARED GENERIC market-insight template.

evidence.notes: COMPOSITION candidate; NDIS has NO proven variant and NO render. Proof would live at the variant level once the D7 dry-run (step 7) passes a PK visual gate.

variants.purpose: NDIS binding of the SHARED GENERIC 1:1 market-insight card (the fleet template PP's live image_quote also renders). NDIS-specific artwork is NOT authored — only the governed data (logo/background/contract literals) differs per brand.
variants.provider_status_note: generic_market_insight_card_1x1_v1 (scope=generic, provider 48cba556-0a53-4001-90f0-05420d10efc0, registry template 0e006c5c-45aa-4829-82ec-89dd282a8c56). Shared fleet-wide; select_template's candidate pool. NDIS reaches it via a client assignment (N2, pending) at visually_approved+ with a passed visual_approval proof (N3, pending).
variants.known_limitations: UNPROVEN for NDIS. Blocked on: N2 assignment, N3 visual-proof event, N5 background intake+promotion, N7b vendored contract deploy (category/footer), and G0a (PP no-regression proof, now DB-confirmed). Category/footer literals to_be_confirmed. No NDIS render exists.

evidence.notes: Authored DARK. NDIS Yarns has never rendered. Proof requires the step-7 governed dry-run (FB first) + PK visual PASS (status + emitted modifications with NO PP string + composed pixels, per the D7 pass condition).

creative_instances._note: Creative Instances are produced render events (m.post_render_log). NDIS Yarns has NONE.

capability_contracts.purpose: Capability contract for the NDIS Yarns image_quote governed render path (second brand). Declares variant identity, field classes, governed assets, fallback, evidence. Declarative source of truth; the RUNTIME consumes a VENDORED projection (creative_contract.ts CREATIVE_CONTRACT_REGISTRY) — a SEPARATE T3 code+deploy lane (N7b). CANDIDATE — unproven; NDIS has never rendered.

gate.note: Deterministic resolver inputs ONLY. resolveCreativeContract keys on `${client_id}::${recommended_format}`. Until this contract is vendored into CREATIVE_CONTRACT_REGISTRY and deployed, resolveCreativeContract returns null for NDIS -> image-worker fail-closes brand_payload_contract_unresolved (post-G0b).

ai_authored.note: Hard-gate; blank/overflow fails loud. max_chars mirrors PP; re-confirm against NDIS corpus.

derived.note: Empty body -> '' (render proceeds); over-length truncated, never failed.

renderer_fixed.note: PK DECISION 2026-07-18: fixed v1 badge 'NDIS UPDATE' (broad fallback for the initial governed static path; content-aware badges e.g. NDIS EXPLAINER/NDIS NEWS are out of this proof).

PK DECISION 2026-07-18: footer explicitly RESOLVED BLANK — an intentional empty string '' (NOT null/absent, NOT a URL/handle/brand-name/tagline). Verified: buildProofFieldsFromDraft (image-worker v3.28.0:83) checks `footer === undefined`, so '' passes the completeness guard (RESOLVED, not brand_payload_contract_incomplete). Renderer must suppress the Footer element cleanly (no placeholder/divider/orphan spacing) — a render-level property confirmed at the step-7 visual gate (supported by PP's empty Location='' precedent on the same generic template; Footer is a distinct element, so confirm specifically).

logo.note: Eligible 2026-07-17 (D7 step 2, asset_id d1b10010). Reconstruction accepted for proof; authoritative swap = separate PK gate.

background.note: No hardcoded pool (mirrors PP contract v3). Resolved per-render by the TMR spine. PENDING: at least one governed+eligible NDIS background (P0 set brand_texture-01 / civic_neutral-04) must be intaken+promoted or the Background slot fail-closes.

validator_policy.slice_1: none (declarative identity + projection only — no validator, no AI change, no behaviour change)
validator_policy.pre_render: validate headline (present, <=90) + subtitle (<=90) + governed-asset reachability (logo + >=1 eligible background) against THIS contract BEFORE render; record render_spec.contract_validation {pass|fail, failed_fields[]}
validator_policy.note: Mirrors the PP contract's validator_policy shape (property-pulse.json). Declarative only; the runtime validator lives in the vendored image-worker path (contract_validation.ts), not this file.

capability_contracts.runtime_consumption: vendored projection only; NO live JSON import (runtime-import guard). The vendored runtime-safe constant (N7b) is derived from THIS entry and must cite its source_commit. N7b is a T3 ef-builder + deploy lane on image-worker + ai-worker (adds one CREATIVE_CONTRACT_REGISTRY entry ×2), render-critical, PK deploy gate.

evidence.notes: CANDIDATE / UNPROVEN. NDIS Yarns has produced NO governed render and NO publish. This contract is not yet vendored (resolveCreativeContract returns null for NDIS). Proof requires: N7b vendored+deployed (with concrete category/footer), N2/N3 assignment+proof, N5 background eligible, then the step-7 dry-run + PK visual PASS. No proof claimed.
